action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 11 ran CLIP-L/14 for 2 epochs (~37min) reaching val_f1=0.0928 - did NOT exceed previous best B/16 (0.0996), so best.pt was preserved at B/16. ~1.99h left, 19 iters. Analysis: L/14 didn't improve in just 2 epochs and B/16 plateaued. Time is tight - ~2h left. Safest path is to submit current best.pt (B/16 0.0996 val / 0.0642 eval) as final or try one more thing. Eval submission takes ~3-4min. Decision: Just submit current best.pt to lock in eval result. Don't risk more training given time pressure.
